drivers.notes: Extended phase plug on a K-792 horn
2-inch driver on a K-406M Tractrix horn
12-inch woofer in a horn-loaded vented system

description.en: Latest evolution of the La Scala, with upgraded HF and MF compression drivers (K-771 on K-792 horn, K-933-HP on K-406M Tractrix horn) over a horn-loaded 12-inch K-28 woofer. Optional active DSP crossover; 103 dB sensitivity in a fully horn-loaded self-contained cabinet.
description.es: Última evolución del La Scala, con drivers de compresión HF y MF actualizados (K-771 sobre horn K-792, K-933-HP sobre horn Tractrix K-406M) sobre un woofer K-28 de 12" horn-loaded. Crossover DSP activo opcional; 103 dB de sensibilidad en un gabinete totalmente horn-loaded y autosuficiente.
